query_title: Chelsea Peretti: One of the Greats

recommendations.title: The Other End of the Line
recommendations.overview: An employee at an Indian call-center travels to San Francisco to be with a guy she falls for over the phone.

recommendations.title: Metallica and San Francisco Symphony: S&M2
recommendations.overview: S&M2, the live concert film from Metallica and the San Francisco Symphony is the concert event of the year!  S&M2 features 20 songs from the two-night event that opened San Francisco’s new Chase Center, with many Metallica fan favourites and two uniq

recommendations.title: One Direction: Where We Are - The Concert Film
recommendations.overview: Where We Are: Live from San Siro Stadium features the entire 23 track concert filmed at San Siro Stadium in Milan in June 2014, as well as 24 minutes of bonus content including backstage footage of One Direction and their crew.

recommendations.title: Foul Play
recommendations.overview: A shy San Francisco librarian and a bumbling cop fall in love as they solve a crime involving albinos, dwarves, and the Catholic Church.

recommendations.title: Vertigo
recommendations.overview: A retired San Francisco detective suffering from acrophobia investigates the strange activities of an old friend's wife, all the while becoming dangerously obsessed with her.

recommendations.title: Woman on Top

recommendations.title: Someone Great
recommendations.overview: An aspiring music journalist lands her dream job and is about to move to San Francisco when her boyfriend of nine years decides to call it quits. To nurse her broken heart, she and her two best friends spend one outrageous last adventure in New York

recommendations.title: Blue Jasmine

recommendations.title: Bloodsport
recommendations.overview: An American Army Major goes AWOL to Hong Kong for an outlawed martial arts contest called the Kumite.

recommendations.title: My Little Eye
recommendations.overview: Five young people apply to live in an isolated house together for six months whilst their every move is filmed by numerous cameras.
